title: CobbleCraft S5
description:
The OFFICIAL CobbleCraft S5 Modpack!

This is the place to lay your hands on this amazing collection of mods, and to be able to play CobbleCraft!

(Season 5)
body:
This is the OFFCIAL CobbleCraft S5 Modpack!

**All credits are due to the respective developers of ALL mods in this modpack.**

This Modpack Includes EVERYTHING. But only whilst keeping performance and FPS high!

This modpack includes the likes of,

Alex's Mobs + Naturalist 🐮

![Lots of mobs! (Alex's Mobs, Naturalist)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c16bf82e70cea0ef9de4450458578f10babc9f7b_0.webp)

Create + Additions ⚙️

![Create mod! (+ additions)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a19fbd8fba3ac6ce4fb85a18fbee09954615a6e_0.webp)

Farmer's Delight + Additions 🍎

![Lots of Food! (Farmer's Delight + additions)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d6ea4330f6f858128cf2f0c054d26065ef81a72_0.webp)


And Much, Much More. ⭐

**Required Mod Links**
- [https://modrinth.com/mod/quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)

**All credits are due to the respective developers of ALL mods in this modpack.**
